allow: Bash(printf '%s\\n' '# Better Habits' '' 'A simple daily habit tracker. Open `index.html` in any browser — no install needed.' '' '## Features' '- Track daily habits with one-tap check-off' '- Streak counters' '- Stats and a 30-day completion chart' '- Data saved locally in the browser \(localStorage\)' '' '## Roadmap' '- macOS notification nudges \(reminders even when the app is closed\)' '- Per-habit charts' '- Export/backup data')
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Add Better Habits MVP: daily tracking, streaks, stats chart *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'v0.2: editable names, per-habit history grid, export/import, docs, nudge system *)
